content.json:
# Surf API Telemetry
Operational dashboard for the Surf multi-agent orchestration API. Panels cover chat latency, RAG health, quality gate outcomes, and error counters.

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'surf.chat.duration_seconds'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize
    p50 = percentile(value, 50),
    p95 = percentile(value, 95),
    p99 = percentile(value, 99)
  by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Chat Performance -- Duration Percentiles

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'surf.rag.search_duration_seconds'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize avg_duration = avg(value) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: RAG Health -- Average Search Duration (s)

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'surf.rag.results_count'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize avg_results = avg(value) by bin(timestamp, 5m)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: RAG Health -- Average Results Count

content.query:
customMetrics
| where name == 'surf.quality_gate.triggers_total'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| extend check = tostring(customDimensions['check'])
| summarize triggers = sum(valueCount) by bin(timestamp, 15m), check
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Quality Gate -- Triggers by Check

content.query:
let timeouts = customMetrics
| where name == 'surf.workflow.timeout_total'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize timeouts = sum(valueCount) by bin(timestamp, 5m);
let rate_limits = customMetrics
| where name == 'surf.rate_limit.hits_total'
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| summarize rate_limit_hits = sum(valueCount) by bin(timestamp, 5m);
let server_errors = requests
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where toint(resultCode) >= 500
| summarize ['5xx_count'] = count() by bin(timestamp, 5m);
timeouts
| join kind=fullouter rate_limits on timestamp
| join kind=fullouter server_errors on timestamp
| project
    timestamp = coalesce(timestamp, timestamp1, timestamp2),
    timeouts = coalesce(timeouts, 0),
    rate_limit_hits = coalesce(rate_limit_hits, 0),
    ['5xx_count'] = coalesce(['5xx_count'], 0)
| order by timestamp asc
content.title: Errors -- Timeouts, Rate Limits & 5xx Responses
